# oh-my-docs

Multi-agent orchestration harness specialized for document work (pptx/docx/xlsx/hwpx).

This site follows the Diátaxis four-quadrant structure. Pick the quadrant for what you
need right now:

- **Tutorials** — learning by doing, a lesson with safe, guaranteed steps:
  [Getting started](tutorials/getting-started.md).
- **How-to guides** — a goal at work, a recipe that assumes competence:
  [Produce and verify a document](how-to/produce-and-verify.md).
- **Reference** — information lookup, dry and structured facts:
  [Skills and agents](reference/skills-and-agents.md) ·
  [Format cards](reference/format-cards.md).
- **Explanation** — understanding, a discussion of why:
  [Design principles](explanation/design-principles.md).
